query: complementary color clash magenta green photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / clashing_disharmony — magenta-green complementary clashes, jarring color pairs

response.objective_caption: A close-up photograph of a flower's center showing curved yellowish-brown stamens emerging from a dark reddish core, surrounded by bright purple petals with visible veining.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up photograph of a flower's center showing curved yellowish-brown stamens and a dark reddish core against bright purple petals. The image exhibits blocky digital compression artifacts and pixelation that smear fine surface details, along with visible color banding across the purple petals that produces uneven tonal gradation.
